title: Types In Swift
content:
# 类型

## 命名类型（Named Type）

### 整数（Integer）

```swift
// Integer
var age: Int = 9223372036854775807 // x64, = Int64 ; x32, = Int32
var age8: Int8 = -128 // -2^7 to 2^7 - 1
var age16: Int16 = 32767 // -2^15 to 2^15 - 1
var age32: Int32 = 2147483647 // -2^31 to 2^31 - 1
var age64: Int64 = 9223372036854775807 // -2^63 to 2^63 - 1
```

### 浮点数（Float、Double）

```swift
// Double
var pi1: Float = 3.14 // 1.2E-38 to 3.4E+38 (~6 digits)
// Double
var pi2: Double = 3.14 // 2.3E-308 to 1.7E+308 (~15 digits)
```

### 字符串（String、Character）

```swift
// String
let text: String = "This is a message!"
var text2: String = String(13) // "13"
// Character
let text3: Character = "d"
```

### 布尔值（Bool）

```swift
// Bool
let isTrue: Bool = true
var isFalse: Bool = false
```

### 数组（Array）

```swift
// Arrays
var array1: Array<String> = ["Apple", "Banana"]
array1.append("Orange")
array1[1].count

// as
var array2 = ["Apple"] as [Any]
array2[0]
```

### 字典（Dictionary）

```swift
var dict1 = ["x1": 123, "y2": 23432]

dict1["x1"]
dict1["x1"] = 9898
dict1["z3"] = 000
```

### 集合（Set）

```swift
var set1: Set = [1, 3, 3]
var array3 = [3,3,3,3,3,3]
var set3 = Set(array3)

var set2 = set1.union(set3)
```

### 类（Class）

```swift

```

### 枚举（Enum）

```swift

```

## 复合类型（Compound Type）

### 元组类型（Tuple Type）

```swift
// define tuple type
var point = (x:1, y:2)
var persion = (height: 170, weight: 70, sex: "Male")

// right assign
point(3, 3)
point.x = 5
point.y = 5

// wrong assign
point = (a:1, b:2) // It is wrong
```

### 函数类型（Function Type）

```swift
func myFunction(){
    print("This is my function!")
}

for i in 1 ... 3 {
    myFunction()
}

func sum(x: Int, y: Int) -> Int {
    return x + y
}

sum(x: 1, y: 2)

func compare(a:Int, b:Int) -> Bool {
    return a > b
}

compare(a: 3, b: 2)
```

title: Variables In Swift
content:
# 变量

## 常量

```swift
// let keyword
let pi = 3.141592657
pi = 3.141592658 // It is wrong
```

## 变量

```swift
// var keyword
var name = "Aarush"
name = "Mike" // It is right
```

## 声明方式

#### 显式声明（explicit declaration）

```swift
// define
var age: Int
// initialization
age = 28

// define && initialization
let message: String = "This is a message!"
```

#### 隐式声明（implicit declaration）

```swift
let name = "Aarush" // String Type
var age = 16 // Int Type
```
